briefdescription.para: KDF KAT key length in bytes.
KDF KAT context length in bytes.
KDF KAT SHA3-256 output length in bytes.
This function validates the CMAC KDF input parameters.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XAsu_CmacKdfParams structure which holds the parameters of CMAC KDF input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if CMAC KDF input parameters validation is successful.
XST_FAILURE, if CMAC KDF input parameters validation fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate CMAC KDF parameters pointer.
Key manager is not supported for CMAC KDF, KeyId must be 0.
Validate CMAC KDF parameters.
Validate that the input key length is either 128 bits or 256 bits for CMAC KDF.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to generate the derived key of specified key length by using the Key Derivative Function (KDF) in counter mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_KdfParams structure which holds the parameters of KDF input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters.
Get the command ID based on SHA type.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to generate the derived key of specified key length by using the Key Derivative Function (KDF) in counter mode with CMAC as PRF.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_CmacKdfParams structure which holds the parameters of KDF input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters.
Create command header for the CMAC KDF command.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to generate the derived key of specified key length by using the HKDF (HMAC-based Extract-and-Expand Key Derivation Function).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_HkdfParams structure which holds the parameters of KDF input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters.
Validate HMAC KDF parameters.
Get the command ID based on SHA type.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to perform KDF Known Answer Tests (KAT's).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: Callback function for KDF client-side KAT.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the notify flag and stores the completion status via per-invocation state.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the caller's XAsu_KdfKatCbState on stack.

briefdescription.para: This function runs the client-side KDF KAT using SHA3-256.

para.verbatim: It calls XAsu_KdfGenerate, busy-waits for the callback, and compares the derived key output against the expected value.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if KDF SHA3-256 KAT passes.
XST_FAILURE, if KDF computation or comparison fails.

inbodydescription.para: Set up client parameters with KAT callback.
Set up KDF parameters.
Send KDF generate request to the server.
Busy-wait for the server response.
Check the callback status.
Compare the derived key against the expected value.
Zeroize local output buffer.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the client interface functions for HMAC based Key Derivation Function (HKDF) module.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 ma 01/21/25 Initial release rmv 09/11/25 Move KDF parameter validation function to common file kp 02/26/26 Added client-side KDF SHA3-256 KAT
